home.universe1Text: Freshly prepared by our chefs, in the purest Japanese tradition.
home.universe2Text: A wide selection of makis and California rolls, creative and flavorful.
home.universe3Text: Japanese skewers and grilled dishes cooked in front of you on the hot plate.
home.universe4Text: Udon, soba and stir-fried noodles, prepared fresh just as you like.
home.universe5Text: Vegetables and seafood in a light, crispy batter.
home.universe6Text: Shrimp, prawns and fresh seafood, to enjoy without limits.
home.universe7Text: Mochi, sweet makis and homemade crepes for a sweet finish.
home.galleryPreviewText: A modern setting with Japanese touches, designed down to the smallest detail for an unforgettable visual experience.
home.ctaText: Come and enjoy a unique culinary experience, full of conviviality, world flavors and a refined atmosphere.

home.universesCardTitle: And so much more to discover on site.

about.historyIntro: Sushi Umami is more than a restaurant: it's an invitation to a journey at the heart of Japanese cuisine, in a single meal. All-you-can-eat, our buffet brings together the best of Japanese gastronomy — sushi and sashimi prepared fresh, creative makis, yakitori, tempura, wok noodles and homemade desserts — in an elegant setting with clean lines and golden touches, designed to offer a refined yet welcoming experience.
about.historyText3: The restaurant stands out with its seven themed worlds, each designed to awaken the senses and multiply discoveries. Sushi, makis, yakitori, tempura or homemade desserts: everyone can choose their own journey, all you can eat.
about.historyText4: A unique experience to live… and relive.
about.philosophyText1: At Sushi Umami, every meal is an adventure at the heart of Japan. Our generous buffets let you discover the best of Japanese cuisine: sushi, sashimi, makis, yakitori, tempura, wok noodles and homemade desserts. There's something for every taste… and every craving.
about.philosophyText3: But beyond the plate, we want to nourish the senses: immersive decor, a warm atmosphere and attentive service enhance every meal.
about.teamText1: Behind every dish is a passionate, united and multicultural team, driven by service excellence and respect for culinary traditions.
about.teamText2: Our chefs embody the richness of our menu, each bringing their personal touch to elevate world recipes with authenticity and creativity.
about.teamCohesion: Team cohesion: a family atmosphere that can be felt in the warmth of the welcome.
about.qualityCommitment: Quality & freshness: carefully selected products, renewed every day to guarantee you the best.
about.environment: Environmental respect: we fight against food waste and integrate sustainable practices into our daily operations.

menu.hoursNote: Open every day, lunch and dinner
menu.rule1: Children's prices apply upon presentation of an ID.
menu.rule2: Food waste: €10 per person and per unfinished dish.
menu.rule3: Food not eaten on site cannot be taken away.
